composition_vocabulary: Tiles alternate between flat lay product shots and direct-on-white editorial cuts. Objects are centred or slightly off-centre with minimal negative space; the moodboard reads as catalogue-dense rather than contemplative.
lighting_quality: Predominantly flat, even studio or daylight lighting with minimal shadow modelling; no chiaroscuro or atmospheric treatment.
material_textures: smooth matte rubber, polished resin, soft jersey knit, inked parchment/illustration paper, translucent acrylic, bare skin
aesthetic_register: Streetwear-adjacent meets talisman: the sample sits firmly in contemporary art-school/streetwear with occult-symbol undercurrents rather than traditional luxury or heirloom territory.
notably_absent: There is no fine metal (gold, silver, patinated bronze), no gemstone, no velvet or aged surface, and no editorial jewellery styling — the conventional signals of luxury-jewellery moodboarding are entirely absent.
